facebook.caption:
639 reviews. 4.3 stars. And most tourists still walk right past Tahiti Hotel on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo.

Outdoor pool. Beach access on select rooms. Casual vibe with zero pretension. This is the kind of Phu Quoc stay that gets repeat visitors.

Not every trip needs a five-star resort. Sometimes 4.3 and a pool does exactly the job.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
